posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Here’s what’s new in the past few weeks:

API

  • API version change
  • New custom_activity object
  • New team_owners and team_subscribers fields on boards queries
  • New create and delete teams mutations

Apps

  • Updated security and compliance submission flow
  • New CLI command to manage secrets
